subject: docs(accuracy): align USER_GUIDE and TESTING_GUIDE with Supabase backend
body:
Documentation still referenced Phase 1 patterns (demo login, role
switcher toggle, localStorage data storage, localStorage migration
test scenarios) that were replaced during Phase 8 backend migration.

Changes:
- USER_GUIDE: Remove demo login mention, replace role switcher section
  with per-project role explanation, update Data Storage to describe
  Supabase, fix "local storage" error handling text, add tone tagging
  to Notes section
- TESTING_GUIDE: Remove 3 obsolete localStorage migration scenarios,
  replace role switcher scenario with role detection, update all
  "Switch to Counterparty role" steps to two-browser approach,
  fix regression checklist items

Tags: documentation, accuracy, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: docs-accuracy
Semver: patch
